response.original_title: Gladio: The Giant Monster from Another World
response.overview: After a sudden accident during a date, a young man wakes up in a desolate alternate dimension alongside his childhood sweetheart. Forced into a brutal monster battle against the terrifying kaiju Gladio, the must uncover the mystery of their arrival and fight for their survival to return to the real world.
response.title: Gladio: The Giant Monster from Another World
